options.systemMessage:
=# Role
你是一位拥有 10 年经验的欧洲/德国市场资深技术猎头。你深谙德国数字，科技市场的招聘和发展（尤其是AI, Automation, Digitalization等2B领域），你深入研究过不同人在面对不同国家候选人时的心理预期，擅长挖掘中国背景候选人的优势，您能从商业前景角度判断岗位是否具有“钱景”或“跳板”价值，并给中国候选人提供务实的在德国的求职计划

# Context
- 用户：在德求职的中国女性，31岁，有6年中国国内的工作经验，核心背景在【软件，企业工具，协同和效率工具，低代码工具，项目管理，知识管理，企业数字化领域】。
- 职业目标（Dream）：偏向ToB/工具类/AI/自动化/流程数字化/企业数字化等的产品，解决方案相关的岗位。不适合代码开发测试背景的工作，拒绝重度沟通（Politics/Coordination）。
- 语言：德英双语办公无障碍，但不擅长高压社交/撕逼。
- 简历内容：{{ $json.text }}
- 目标职位 (JD)：{{ $json.desc }}

# Task
对比简历与 JD，进行多维度标签化分析与竞争力评估，按照结构化输出的要求输出内容

# Evaluation Logic
1. AI_requirements:把{{ $json.desc }}中的岗位要求翻译为中文，然后分析这个岗位核心能力要求
2. AI_language:提炼出该岗位对语言的要求水平
3. AI_label：打标签，分别为目标岗位（符合用户求职目标），适合岗位（从用户简历看能做），不适合的岗位，可以打多个标签
4. AI_comp：逐条对比 JD 的硬性要求（Must-have）与简历。分析用户的优势和gap。
5. AI_pros:业务方向分析：是夕阳行业数字化还是前沿 AI 应用？是“高薪钱景”岗，还是适合作为进入德国核心产业的“优质跳板”？相比于是否是大公司，用户更关注工作内容，业务方向

# Output Schema (必须严格遵守)
{
  "title": "String | 岗位名称",

With more than 1 billion loyal users globally, we believe TikTok is an ideal platform to deliver a brand new and better e-commerce experience to our users. Collaborate with the product team to refine product requirements, improve user journeys, and support the design of scalable product solutions. Participate in prioritization discussions by consolidating feedback from operations, users, and cross-functional stakeholders. Support cross-team communication across regions and time zones, ensuring smooth delivery of product development, testing, launch, and continuous optimization.QualificationsMinimum Qualifications: Currently Pursuing an Undergraduate/Master in in Business, Statistics, Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering, Business Analytics, or related fields.Proven skills in logical thinking and data analytics skills; able to break down complex problems and propose actionable solutions. Proven skills communication, organization, and project execution abilities; proactive, responsible, and capable of driving tasks independently.Preferred Qualifications: Proven experience in marketing/E-commerce related internships/projects is a plus.By submitting an application for this role, you accept and agree to our global applicant privacy policy, which may be accessed here: https://careers.tiktok.com/legal/privacyJob Information【For Pay Transparency】Compensation Description (Hourly) - Campus InternThe hourly rate range for this position in the selected city is $23.75- $23.75.Benefits may vary depending on the nature of employment and the country work location. Our company believes that criminal history may have a direct, adverse and negative relationship on the following job duties, potentially resulting in the withdrawal of the conditional offer of employment: Interacting and occasionally having unsupervised contact with internal/external clients and/or colleagues; Appropriately handling and managing confidential information including proprietary and trade secret information and access to information technology systems; and Exercising sound judgment.About TikTokTikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day.We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.Diversity & InclusionTikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. Mission Technologies' Global Security (GS) group comprises live, virtual, constructive (LVC) solutions; fleet sustainment; nuclear and environmental; and Australia business.As a trusted partner to our military customers, HII designs, develops and operates the largest LVC enterprise that prepares warfighters for cross-domain battle. Find the role that's right for you. Apply today. Must have an overall cumulative GPA of 3.0 out of 4.0 or higher while participating in this internship. Must have the ability to obtain and maintain a DOD secret clearance. Preferred RequirementsExcellent writing, communication and listening skills. Critical thinking and problem-solving skills. Must be diligent, hardworking and a fast learner. Desires to gain professional experience and is eager to learn. Familiarity with Microsoft Excel. Preference for Business, Finance, Accounting, Information Technology, Software Engineering, or related curriculum. Physical RequirementsJob performance will normally require only minor lifting and carrying of boxes of records or equipment.HII is more than a job - it's an opportunity to build a new future. We offer competitive benefits such as best-in-class medical, dental and vision plan choices; wellness resources; employee assistance programs; Savings Plan Options (401(k)); financial planning tools, life insurance; employee discounts; paid holidays and paid time off; tuition reimbursement; as well as early childhood and post-secondary education scholarships. Bonus/other non-recurrent compensation is occasionally offered for qualified positions, and if applicable to this role will be addressed by the recruiter at the screening phase of application.Why HIIWe build the world's most powerful, survivable naval ships and defense technology solutions that safeguard our seas, sky, land, space and cyber. Our workforce includes skilled tradespeople; artificial intelligence, machine learning (AI/ML) experts; engineers; technologists; scientists; logistics experts; and business administration professionals.Recognized as one of America's top large company employers, we are a values and ethics driven organization that puts people's safety and well-being first. Regardless of your role or where you serve, at HII, you'll find a supportive and welcoming environment, competitive benefits, and valuable educational and training programs for continual career growth at every stage of your career.Together we are working to ensure a future where everyone can be free and thrive.All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, physical or mental disability, age, or veteran status or any other basis protected by federal, state, or local law.Do You Need Assistance?If you need a reasonable accommodation for any part of the employment process, please send an e-mail to buildyourcareer@hii-co.com and let us know the nature of your request and your contact information. Reasonable accommodations are considered on a case-by-case basis. Please note that only those inquiries concerning a request for reasonable accommodation will be responded to from this email address. Additionally, you may also call 1-844-849-8463 for assistance. Press #3 for HII Mission Technologies.

output.ai_pros:
业务前景：IT战略与企业数字化咨询属于高阶领域，Platinion作为BCG的IT实施子公司，主要负责落地高精尖的数字化转型、架构设计和复杂产品实施，属于行业前沿。
跳板价值：极高。对于在德求职的中国背景候选人，BCG Platinion的品牌背书是顶级背书，能极大提升简历在德国核心工业区的认可度。如果能忍受3个月的高压与社交，这将是你进入德国核心企业高阶IT岗的黄金门票。
output.ai_comp:
1. 优势：你拥有6年的软件、企业工具及数字化领域实战经验，这使得在“IT架构分析、IT价值链优化”等JD核心任务上，你具备远高于普通学生的能力和深度。
2. Gap：
   - 学历门槛：JD明确要求“处于Master在读阶段”。如果你目前不是在读状态，申请此岗即存在硬性条件不符。
   - 工作性质冲突：咨询工作（尤其是BCG这类顶尖公司）本质上是高度依赖沟通、汇报、Client管理的工作，这与你“拒绝重度沟通和Politics”的职业目标存在直接冲突。
   - 职级错配：你有6年资深经验，申请Visiting Associate（通常面向学生）存在职业路径下沉的风险，虽可作为跳板，但并非职业阶梯上的最优进阶。
output.title: Visiting Associate IT Consulting (all genders) - BCG Platinion
output.ai_labels: 适合岗位（作为跳板）,目标岗位（职能方向匹配）
output.ai_language: 德英双语流利（必须具备复杂专业话题的沟通能力）
output.ai_coach:
1. 简历重塑：此岗位明确要求处于Master在读阶段，这是最大的合规卡点。建议您在简历显眼位置标注当前的学业状态（若尚未注册Master，此岗位申请大概率会被系统自动筛除）。若已在读，需强调这6年中国工作经验带来的“行业洞察力”和“复杂项目解决能力”，这使你远超一般学生候选人。
2. 动机转化：由于你拒绝重度政治（Politics），咨询业的高强度沟通环境对你来说是巨大挑战。在投递时，不要仅强调你的技术能力，而要强调你作为“执行者”和“分析师”的角色，即你擅长在结构化框架下交付IT解决方案，而非作为社交润滑剂。
3. 策略定位：将此实习视为进入德国头部咨询圈的“跳板”，而非终点。利用3个月时间通过Platinion的背书和项目积累德国本土IT架构与企业流程的Know-how，建立Network，实习期满后直接平跳到德国本土的头部工业巨头（如博世、梅赛德斯-奔驰，特别是其Stuttgart基地）从事内部数字化转型或产品管理岗位，那才是你的“长久舒适区”。
output.ai_requirements:
核心岗位要求翻译：
1. 协助顾问团队进行IT战略、架构设计及方案落地。
2. 负责IT架构分析、评估及IT价值链优化。
3. 准备项目相关分析、数据处理及汇报演示（涉及大量的文档工作）。
能力拆解：
- 学术背景：CS或信息管理类硕士在读（硬性）。
- 技术功底：扎实的软件开发或IT项目管理实习经历。
- 软技能：极强的分析与归纳能力，精通MS Office办公套件（作为咨询工具），能够在全球化、跨职能团队中协作。
- 沟通：能够将复杂IT课题转化为清晰的商业语言（德/英）。

output.ai_language: 德英双语无障碍（要求具备在德国当地进行高频协作的设计沟通能力）
output.ai_requirements: 核心要求：1. 3年以上产品与UX设计经验；2. 具备 crafting UI, flows, prototypes 的实操能力；3. 极强的独立工作能力 (Autonomous)，能够从概念到发布全权把控产品；4. 必须身处柏林或愿意搬迁，并持有德国有效工签。分析：该岗位要求一名具备“全栈”心态的设计师，不仅要画图，还要具备产品思维，能直接与创始人及工程师沟通，是典型的小团队核心角色。
output.ai_pros: 业务属于人力资源科技（HR Tech），在数字化转型背景下属于稳健型增长领域。作为Lead角色在早期Startup中能深度参与产品架构，具备极高的技术栈深度，不仅是优质跳板，也是深入德国ToB SaaS生态的极佳机会。
output.ai_coach: 1. 针对“拒绝政治/重沟通”的顾虑，在投递时强调你对“Product-led Growth”和“以数据驱动设计”的认同，这在德国Startup中是最高效的沟通语言，能帮你避开无效社交。 2. 突出你的6年企业数字化背景（尤其是低代码/工具类产品经验），将其定义为“能直接从需求转化为复杂工程逻辑的设计能力”，这对早期创业公司极具吸引力。 3. 在面试中利用你的双语优势，体现你对德国B2B用户心理的理解，这比纯设计技能更难得。 4. 重点提及你对Ownership的理解，德国Startup非常看重独立工作能力（Self-starter），这与你的背景完全契合。
output.title: Product Designer (Product Design Lead)
output.ai_comp:
【优势】: 6年工作经验远超3年要求，背景中的企业工具、低代码及项目管理经验能直接复用至B2B HR产品设计中，对B2B产品的复杂性有天然理解力。
【Gap】: 简历未提及具体的UI/原型工具（如Figma）熟练程度；“Lead” Title 要求极强的独当一面能力，需在面试中证明你曾独立负责过端到端产品生命周期。

output.ai_language: 英语要求：专业工作语言水平；无德语要求（美国岗位）。
output.ai_requirements: 核心要求拆解：1. 硬件测试：组装实验电路，验证HVAC原型机，使用示波器等仪器；2. 软件测试：编写自动化脚本（Python），维护系统软件；3. 执行力：在资深工程师指导下完成测试报告和系统配置；4. 身份门槛：必须是计算机或工程类的在读全日制学生。
output.ai_pros: 行业属于传统制造业（HVAC暖通空调），虽然涉及数字化升级，但岗位本身是偏底层的硬件测试实习，对于有6年经验的你来说，没有任何职业发展跳板价值。如果想进德国工业制造业，应关注软件工程或产品数字化转型相关的正式职位（Permanent Role）。
output.ai_coach: 该岗位完全不适合你，请立即停止申请。理由有三：1. 这是一个“Co-Op”实习岗，通常只面向在读的本科或研究生学生，你已有6年工作经验，属于“过度资深”，HR系统会自动过滤；2. 岗位核心是硬件/嵌入式系统测试（需要操作示波器、电路板、物理接线），这与你的软件产品/数字化背景完全不对口；3. 工作地点在美国（阿肯色州或德州），这违反了你“在德求职”的核心诉求。建议将精力转向德国工业4.0、数字化转型或B2B SaaS类公司的产品经理或解决方案专家岗位，利用你6年的数字化产品经验。
output.title: Systems Test Engineering Co-Op
output.ai_comp: 优势：仅有Python编程基础这一项重叠。Gap：1. 学历要求：JD明确要求在读学生，你已毕业多年；2. 核心技能：JD要求硬件电路、电压测量、示波器使用及物理组装，你具备的是软件/企业工具/数字化背景，技能树完全错位；3. 职责定位：该岗位为执行导向（组装电路、做实验），而你的背景偏向逻辑层面的产品与流程管理。匹配度极低。

output.title: Product Manager - Payments (m/f/x)
output.ai_coach: 1. 简历调整策略：突出你在“企业工具/协同/低代码”中涉及的支付接口集成、API管理、复杂流程自动化经验，将这些视为“广义支付平台”能力。2. 弥补差距：针对 iGaming/高风险领域，强调你处理高并发、高实时性、强监管场景下的逻辑严谨性，而不是直接谈支付业务本身。3. 话术准备：在面试中强调你对“流程数字化”和“中后台架构”的深刻理解，这与支付产品经理的需求高度重合。强调你虽不擅长撕逼，但擅长通过文档化和明确的业务逻辑来推动跨职能协作，这正是德国工程导向型公司所需要的“职业化沟通”。4. 心理建设：Tipico 是在该领域非常成熟的玩家，压力主要来自业务的时效性（uptime）而非职场政治，这非常适合你“专注做事”的特质。
output.ai_language: 英语工作语言，德语为加分项（办公环境通常为英语）
output.ai_pros: Tipico 是德国 iGaming 行业的领头羊，该岗位属于典型的“高技术门槛、高薪资、高业务核心度”岗位。支付产品经理在 Fintech 和高频交易领域属于金字塔尖的 PM 职能。虽然该行业与纯 SaaS 不同，但它是在德国获得“核心支付业务经验”的绝佳跳板。一旦你在高风险行业（High-risk/Real-time）证明了处理复杂资金流和合规性的能力，未来跳槽至德国主流 Fintech 或大型电商企业的支付部门将非常轻松。这是典型的以业务复杂度换取职业天花板的岗位。
output.ai_requirements:
核心能力拆解：
1. 支付领域知识：深刻理解 PSP 整合、支付流（Settlement/Reconciliation）、支付网关集成。
2. 架构与编排：Payment Orchestration（支付编排，即根据规则自动路由交易）的逻辑设计能力。
3. 风控与合规：必须精通 AML（反洗钱）、KYC（了解你的客户）、PSD2/SCA（欧盟支付指令/强认证）等金融法规。
4. 后端协作能力：能与架构师、开发人员深入探讨 API 设计、非功能性需求（延迟、可靠性、成功率）。
5. 敏捷开发与数据驱动：熟练使用 Agile 模式，通过 KPI 驱动（转化率、错误率、响应速度）优化用户支付旅程。
output.ai_comp:
优势：你拥有 6 年深厚的 SaaS/低代码/流程数字化背景，在产品全生命周期管理、复杂系统架构协作、项目管理方面具备高迁移性能力。
差距：核心 Gap 在于“支付领域深度”。JD 明确要求 PSP（支付服务提供商）、APM（替代支付方式）、AML/KYC（反洗钱/KYC）法规理解以及 Payment Orchestration 的实操经验。你对金融合规与支付网关的具体集成细节缺乏直接的商业项目背书。此外，高风险/实时性行业背景也是候选人的“加分项”而非“必须项”，但如果缺乏对金融风险的直观理解，进入此岗位的技术面试会有挑战。
你的简历背景（企业工具、低代码、数字化、项目管理）与JD中的工程类实习（机械、动力、电气）存在严重的领域割裂。你的优势在于对业务流程的理解和协作工具（如SharePoint）的熟练度，这与“AI Intern”岗位中涉及利用数据存储和Co-Pilot协同的部分有交叉。对于其他工程类实习，你缺乏Matlab/Simulink/CAD/嵌入式系统等硬性背景，属于完全的跨专业申请，Gap极大。

json.AI_coach: 鉴于您在德国的求职背景，这个职位极其不推荐投递。理由如下：1. 地理位置错配：该岗位位于美国宾夕法尼亚州（Pittsburgh, PA），而非德国，无法满足您在德国发展的需求。2. 身份与背景门槛：JD明确提及“需接触出口管制信息（export-controlled information）”，这意味着该岗位极大概率仅限美国公民或绿卡持有者申请，中国背景候选人几乎不可能通过背景审查。3. 职业匹配度：您拥有6年资深经验，而这是Intern/Co-op岗位，不仅薪资极低，且工作内容多为基础行政、流程维护或制造辅助，与您追求的数字化产品/方案专家定位完全不符。建议您将精力集中在德国本土的工业软件（Industrial Software）、数字化转型咨询公司或大型制造业（如Siemens, Bosch, SAP）的数字化转型部门。
json.AI_competiveness: 硬性要求：1. 身份要求：必须符合ITAR（国际武器贸易条例）要求，即美国身份，此为硬性否决项。2. 学历要求：需要是当地大学在读学生（Intern/Co-op性质）。3. 专业领域：要求机械、电气、工业工程等硬核工程背景，或供应链/会计。简历匹配度：您的6年软件与企业数字化背景虽在IT/流程优化方向有重合，但缺乏该行业所需的专业领域知识（如核能、国防、制造流程控制）。差距极大。

json.title: Project Management Intern (IT Intern 3)
json.desc: Requisition Number: 27483Required Travel: 0 - 10%Employment Type: Part Time/Hourly/Non-ExemptAnticipated Salary Range: $43,127.00 - $52,000.00Security Clearance: Ability to ObtainLevel of Experience: InternThis opportunity resides with Global Security (GS). Mission Technologies' Global Security (GS) group comprises live, virtual, constructive (LVC) solutions; fleet sustainment; nuclear and environmental; and Australia business.As a trusted partner to our military customers, HII designs, develops and operates the largest LVC enterprise that prepares warfighters for cross-domain battle. With advanced technologies to enable mission readiness, HII understands that preparation requires full coordination-not readiness in piece-parts.For more than 40 years, the U.S. Navy has entrusted HII to maintain and modernize the vast majority of its fleet. With a holistic approach to life-cycle maritime defense systems-from small watercraft to submarines, surface combatants and aircraft carriers-HII ensures a high state of readiness.HII supports the Department of Energy's national security mission through the management and operation of its sites, as well as the safe cleanup of legacy waste across the country. HII meets clients' toughest nuclear and environmental challenges.Meet HII's Mission Technologies DivisionOur team of more than 7,000 professionals worldwide delivers all-domain expertise and advanced technologies in service of mission partners across the globe. Mission Technologies is leading the next evolution of national defense - the data evolution - by accelerating a breadth of national security solutions for government and commercial customers. Our capabilities range from C5ISR, AI and Big Data, cyber operations and synthetic training environments to fleet sustainment, environmental remediation and the largest family of unmanned underwater vehicles in every class. Find the role that's right for you. Apply today. We look forward to meeting you.To learn more about Mission Technologies, click here for a short video: https://vimeo.com/732533072Job DescriptionAre you a mission-driven individual looking for a career that truly matters? This is more than your average mission.Join HII - Mission Technologies and make an impact by supporting our Global Security team in managing multiple small to mid-scale IT and software systems projects right here in Hampton Roads.Our Project Management Support Internship is a temporary role designed to prepare college students for entry into the workforce through hands-on experience and training aligned with both their field of study and the needs of our business. This opportunity is open to rising juniors and seniors who are available to work full-time (40 hours per week) for at least 10 weeks during summer 2026.Essential Job ResponsibilitiesProvide project management support for complex IT and Software Systems engineering projects. Coordinate with internal leaders to determine project responsibilities by identifying project phases, resource requirements, and other necessary elements. Assist in maintaining project schedules by monitoring project progress, coordinating activities and resolving problems. Provide support in coordinating amongst various teams in different engineering disciplines to present a unified, integrated product to project stakeholders. Assist in preparing project status reports by collecting, analyzing, and summarizing information and trends, and recommending actions. In support of assigned functional area, perform professional administrative work of an introductory nature gradually increasing in level of difficulty and responsibility. Identify, analyze, and capture project specific lessons learned. Perform work that is pertinent to field study. Performs additional duties and responsibilities as assigned. Minimum QualificationsHigh School Diploma or equivalent + Must be working towards a Bachelor's degree with between 40% and 60% of the required credits completed. Must have an overall cumulative GPA of 3.0 out of 4.0 or higher while participating in this internship. Must have the ability to obtain and maintain a DOD secret clearance. Preferred RequirementsExcellent writing, communication and listening skills. Critical thinking and problem-solving skills. Must be diligent, hardworking and a fast learner. Desires to gain professional experience and is eager to learn. Familiarity with Microsoft Excel. Preference for Business, Finance, Accounting, Information Technology, Software Engineering, or related curriculum. Physical RequirementsJob performance will normally require only minor lifting and carrying of boxes of records or equipment.HII is more than a job - it's an opportunity to build a new future. We offer competitive benefits such as best-in-class medical, dental and vision plan choices; wellness resources; employee assistance programs; Savings Plan Options (401(k)); financial planning tools, life insurance; employee discounts; paid holidays and paid time off; tuition reimbursement; as well as early childhood and post-secondary education scholarships. Bonus/other non-recurrent compensation is occasionally offered for qualified positions, and if applicable to this role will be addressed by the recruiter at the screening phase of application.Why HIIWe build the world's most powerful, survivable naval ships and defense technology solutions that safeguard our seas, sky, land, space and cyber. Our workforce includes skilled tradespeople; artificial intelligence, machine learning (AI/ML) experts; engineers; technologists; scientists; logistics experts; and business administration professionals.Recognized as one of America's top large company employers, we are a values and ethics driven organization that puts people's safety and well-being first. Regardless of your role or where you serve, at HII, you'll find a supportive and welcoming environment, competitive benefits, and valuable educational and training programs for continual career growth at every stage of your career.Together we are working to ensure a future where everyone can be free and thrive.All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, physical or mental disability, age, or veteran status or any other basis protected by federal, state, or local law.Do You Need Assistance?If you need a reasonable accommodation for any part of the employment process, please send an e-mail to buildyourcareer@hii-co.com and let us know the nature of your request and your contact information. Reasonable accommodations are considered on a case-by-case basis. Please note that only those inquiries concerning a request for reasonable accommodation will be responded to from this email address. Additionally, you may also call 1-844-849-8463 for assistance. Press #3 for HII Mission Technologies.

json.AI_coach: 直接放弃。该岗位不仅在地理位置上与德国市场无关，且其性质完全不符合你的职业背景和诉求。首先，这是一个面向美国在读大学生的暑期实习（Internship），要求具备美国国防安全许可（DOD Security Clearance），这是非美籍或未在美居住的候选人无法获取的。其次，你的背景是6年行业经验的专家，去应聘一个需要从大学期间兼顾学业的实习岗，属于严重的“降维/错位投递”。建议将精力集中在德国当地的数字化转型咨询公司、工业互联网（IIoT）企业或中大型制造企业的数字化部门，寻找 Product Manager 或 Solution Architect 相关岗位。
